Vocabulary - बलाबलपरीक्षा | Story 4

09 Apr 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
कश्चन any / someone / a certain / somebody
आसीत् he/she/it was
वृषभ ox / bull / mighty / vigorous / manly
आहारयति eat
श्मश्रु moustache / beard / hairs of the beard
च and
वर्तुलाकार round
इदानीम् now
आक्रामति { आक्रम् } seize
सम्भाषण conversation
भीत्या out of fear
भवतः your
नास्ति It is not / there is not
उद्यत prepared / ready for
पादेन on one’s feet
क्षिप्त thrown
बहिः out of / outside

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
उत्तमम् आसीत् It was fine
कथं आसीत्? How was it?
अद्य आसीत् वा? Was it today?
तत्र आसीत् वा? Was it there?
   
इदानीं किम् ? now what?
इदानीम् एव वा? Is it going to be now ?
इदानीं गच्छानि वा? Can I go now?
इदानीं किम् कुर्मः ? What do we do now?
किं करवाम इदानीम्? Well, what should we do now?
अहम् इदानीम् एव आगतवान् I have just arrived.
इदानीम् अपि स्नानं न कृतम्? No bath yet?
इदानीं गत्वा किञ्चित् पठतु Go and read now.
   
भवतः किम् नाम? What is your name?
भवता एव वक्तव्यम् You have to say.
भवतः वयः कियत् ? How old are you?
भवतः वचनं सत्यम् You are right.
कः भवतः व्यवसायः? May I know your profession?
भवतः गृहे कः पचति? Who does the cooking in your house?
   
इदम् मम नास्ति It is not mine.
नैव, चिन्ता नास्ति No, no trouble
तथा किमपि नास्ति No, it is not so.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
